summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IAM Sprint P0 and P1 features. All backend tests passed (22/22). Frontend UI verified for all key features including new IAM fields, sidebar changes, admin pages, and workflow templates.

critical_code_review_comments: All P0 and P1 IAM features implemented correctly
Identity config endpoint returns simplified roles (Administrator, Operator, Standard User)
Account types properly implemented (Partner, Media Client, Internal Staff, Vendor/Freelancer)
Subscription plans conditional display for Partner account type working
Workflow templates include Pool Routing (24h) and Payments (MOCKED GHL)
Sidebar correctly updated with My Services and Submit New Request
seed_data_creation: Created test data during testing: TEST_Specialty, TEST_Plan, TEST_IAM_User, TEST_Workflow (from Pool Routing template)
context_for_next_testing_agent: IAM Sprint P0/P1 features all working. Key changes verified: 1) Identity model with Account Type, Specialty, Subscription Plan. 2) Sidebar updated with My Services, Submit New Request (Command Center removed). 3) Admin pages for Specialties (57 seeded) and Subscription Plans (Core, Engage, Lead-to-Cash, Scale). 4) Workflow templates for Pool Routing (24h) and Payments (MOCKED GHL). 5) User creation with conditional Subscription Plan for Partners.

p0_identity_access_model.account_types: WORKING (Partner, Media Client, Internal Staff, Vendor/Freelancer)
p0_identity_access_model.per_user_permissions: WORKING (Access Controls tab in user dialog)
